name: Siew's Capital — Mission Control API
description: OpenClaw integration guide for Mission Control. All state is accessible via window.__MISSION_CONTROL_STATE__ and window.__MISSION_CONTROL_API__.

state_access.description: State auto-updates when agents are added, removed, or status changes. All views (Team, Org Chart, Office) sync automatically.

addAgent.returns: boolean — true if added, false if ID already exists

removeAgent.returns: boolean — true if removed, false if not found

getAgents.returns: Array of all agent objects (employees + council + oracle)

status_guide._note: Each agent in __MISSION_CONTROL_STATE__ has these fields for quick status checks:
status_guide.isWorking: boolean — TRUE when agent status is 'online' (actively processing tasks)
status_guide.isIdle: boolean — TRUE when agent status is 'standby' (on standby, not actively working)
status_guide.statusNote: string — human-readable description: 'WORKING — actively processing tasks', 'IDLE — on standby, not actively working', or 'OFFLINE — agent is not available'

statuses.online: WORKING — agent is actively processing tasks. Shows green dot in Office view.
statuses.standby: IDLE — agent exists but is not actively working. Shows yellow dot. Use this for agents not yet deployed.
statuses.offline: OFFLINE — agent is completely unavailable. Won't appear in active counts.

status_guide.how_to_check: const agents = window.__MISSION_CONTROL_STATE__.agents; agents.forEach(a => console.log(a.name, a.statusNote, a.isWorking ? '🟢' : a.isIdle ? '🟡' : '⚫'));

office_behavior._note: The Office view simulates agents moving between rooms on a timed cycle.
office_behavior.transition: When agents change location, they enter a 3-second 'walking' state and appear in the corridor before arriving at their destination.
office_behavior.desk_means_working: Agents at their desk are considered 'working'. Agents in other locations are 'on break' or 'roaming'.

agent_types.agent: Regular employee — gets a desk in workspace, appears in Team view with full details
agent_types.council: Advisory council member — sits in Council Advisory Room, provides risk/growth/devil's advocate perspectives
agent_types.oracle: Strategic consultant — sits in Oracle Chamber, called for high-stakes decisions

examples.hire_new_agent: window.__MISSION_CONTROL_API__.addAgent({ id: 'nova', name: 'NOVA', role: 'Data Scientist', color: '#06B6D4', initials: 'NV', icon: '📊', type: 'agent' })
